

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Adam Alshenawy | Data Analyst & AI Automation</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=DM+Sans:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;1,300&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{
  --bg:#0a0a0a;
  --bg2:#111111;
  --bg3:#181818;
  --accent:#b8f564;
  --accent2:#7be0a8;
  --text:#f0ede8;
  --muted:#8a8680;
  --border:#2a2a2a;
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.7;overflow-x:hidden}

/* Noise overlay */
body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='0.03'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");pointer-events:none;z-index:9999;opacity:0.4}

/* Nav */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:100;padding:20px 60px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04)}
.nav-logo{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:18px;letter-spacing:-0.5px;color:var(--text);text-decoration:none}
.nav-logo span{color:var(--accent)}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:36px;list-style:none}
.nav-links a{color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.3px;transition:color 0.2s}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--text)}

/* Hero */
.hero{min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:120px 60px 80px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.hero-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 420px;gap:80px;align-items:center;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;width:100%}
.hero-tag{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:rgba(184,245,100,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(184,245,100,0.2);border-radius:100px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:13px;color:var(--accent);font-weight:500;margin-bottom:28px;letter-spacing:0.3px}
.hero-tag::before{content:'';width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent);animation:pulse 2s ease infinite}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0.4}}
.hero h1{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(42px,5vw,68px);font-weight:800;line-height:1.05;letter-spacing:-2px;margin-bottom:24px}
.hero h1 .line2{color:var(--accent);display:block}
.hero-desc{color:var(--muted);font-size:17px;line-height:1.75;max-width:520px;margin-bottom:40px;font-weight:300}
.hero-cta{display:flex;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.btn-primary{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:var(--accent);color:#0a0a0a;padding:14px 28px;border-radius:8px;text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;font-size:15px;font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;transition:all 0.2s;letter-spacing:-0.2px}
.btn-primary:hover{background:#caf87a;transform:translateY(-1px)}
.btn-secondary{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:transparent;color:var(--text);padding:14px 28px;border-radius:8px;text-decoration:none;font-weight:500;font-size:15px;border:1px solid var(--border);transition:all 0.2s}
.btn-secondary:hover{border-color:var(--muted);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03)}
.hero-photo-wrap{position:relative}
.hero-photo{width:380px;height:480px;object-fit:cover;object-position:top;border-radius:24px;display:block;filter:grayscale(10%)}
.hero-photo-bg{position:absolute;inset:-12px;border-radius:28px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(184,245,100,0.15),rgba(123,224,168,0.05));z-index:-1}
.hero-stats{position:absolute;bottom:24px;left:-24px;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:16px 20px;display:flex;gap:24px}
.stat{text-align:center}
.stat-num{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:800;color:var(--accent);display:block}
.stat-label{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:0.5px;text-transform:uppercase}

/* Decorative bg elements */
.hero-glow{position:absolute;width:600px;height:600px;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(184,245,100,0.06) 0%,transparent 70%);top:-100px;right:-100px;pointer-events:none}

/* Section */
section{padding:100px 60px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto}
.section-label{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:16px}
.section-title{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(32px,4vw,48px);font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-1.5px;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:16px}
.section-subtitle{color:var(--muted);font-size:17px;max-width:560px;line-height:1.7;font-weight:300}

/* Experience */
.exp-grid{display:grid;gap:2px;margin-top:56px}
.exp-item{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:32px 36px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:16px;transition:border-color 0.2s,background 0.2s;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.exp-item::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:3px;background:var(--accent);transform:scaleY(0);transition:transform 0.3s;transform-origin:bottom}
.exp-item:hover{border-color:rgba(184,245,100,0.2);background:var(--bg3)}
.exp-item:hover::before{transform:scaleY(1)}
.exp-item+.exp-item{margin-top:12px}
.exp-role{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px}
.exp-company{color:var(--accent);font-size:14px;font-weight:500;margin-bottom:12px}
.exp-desc{color:var(--muted);font-size:15px;line-height:1.7;font-weight:300}
.exp-date{color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;font-weight:500;white-space:nowrap;letter-spacing:0.3px;padding-top:4px}

/* Skills */
.skills-wrap{margin-top:56px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:32px}
.skill-group{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:28px 32px}
.skill-group-title{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:20px}
.skill-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px}
.skill-tag{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:100px;padding:7px 16px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);font-weight:400;transition:all 0.2s}
.skill-tag:hover{background:rgba(184,245,100,0.08);border-color:rgba(184,245,100,0.3);color:var(--accent)}

/* Projects */
.projects-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:20px;margin-top:56px}
.project-card{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;transition:all 0.3s;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.project-card:hover{border-color:rgba(184,245,100,0.25);transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)}
.project-card.featured{grid-column:1/-1}
.project-header{padding:32px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:16px}
.project-type{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:10px}
.project-title{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-0.5px;margin-bottom:12px}
.project-desc{color:var(--muted);font-size:14px;line-height:1.7;font-weight:300}
.project-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-top:16px}
.project-tag{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border-radius:6px;padding:4px 10px;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted)}
.project-links{display:flex;gap:10px;padding:0 32px 32px;margin-top:auto}
.proj-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:10px 18px;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;transition:all 0.2s;font-family:'Syne',sans-serif}
.proj-link.live{background:var(--accent);color:#0a0a0a}
.proj-link.live:hover{background:#caf87a}
.proj-link.github{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);color:var(--text);border:1px solid var(--border)}
.proj-link.github:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1)}
.proj-icon{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;flex-shrink:0}

/* Education */
.edu-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:20px;margin-top:56px}
.edu-card{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:28px 32px;transition:border-color 0.2s}
.edu-card:hover{border-color:rgba(184,245,100,0.2)}
.edu-degree{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px}
.edu-school{color:var(--accent);font-size:14px;font-weight:500;margin-bottom:8px}
.edu-detail{color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;line-height:1.6}
.edu-date{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:12px;font-weight:500}

/* Contact */
.contact-wrap{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:24px;padding:64px;text-align:center;margin-top:56px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.contact-wrap::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center top,rgba(184,245,100,0.06),transparent 70%);pointer-events:none}
.contact-wrap h2{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:40px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-1.5px;margin-bottom:16px}
.contact-wrap p{color:var(--muted);font-size:17px;max-width:480px;margin:0 auto 36px;font-weight:300}
.contact-links{display:flex;gap:16px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap}

/* Footer */
footer{border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:32px 60px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;max-width:1300px;margin:0 auto}

/* Animate in */
.fade-up{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px);transition:opacity 0.6s ease,transform 0.6s ease}
.fade-up.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}

@media(max-width:900px){
  nav{padding:18px 24px}
  .hero{padding:100px 24px 60px}
  .hero-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:48px}
  .hero-photo-wrap{display:none}
  section{padding:64px 24px}
  .skills-wrap,.projects-grid,.edu-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .project-card.featured{grid-column:auto}
  .contact-wrap{padding:40px 24px}
  footer{padding:24px;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;text-align:center}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <a href="#" class="nav-logo">Adam<span>.</span></a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#experience">Experience</a></li>
    <li><a href="#projects">Projects</a></li>
    <li><a href="#skills">Skills</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- Hero -->
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-glow"></div>
  <div class="hero-grid">
    <div>
      <div class="hero-tag">Available for opportunities</div>
      <h1>Data Analyst<span class="line2">&amp; AI Automation</span></h1>
      <p class="hero-desc">I turn raw, scattered data into clear insights and build AI-powered automation that eliminates manual work — so teams can focus on what actually matters.</p>
      <div class="hero-cta">
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/adam-alshenawy-600b41267/" target="_blank" class="btn-primary">LinkedIn ↗</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/adamalshenawy" target="_blank" class="btn-secondary">GitHub ↗</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-photo-wrap">
      <div class="hero-photo-bg"></div>
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="hero-photo" alt="Adam Alshenawy" onerror="this.style.display='none'"/>
      <div class="hero-stats">
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">2+</span><span class="stat-label">Years Exp</span></div>
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">8+</span><span class="stat-label">Projects</span></div>
        <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">2</span><span class="stat-label">Roles</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Experience -->
<section id="experience">
  <div class="section-label fade-up">Career</div>
  <h2 class="section-title fade-up">Professional Experience</h2>
  <p class="section-subtitle fade-up">Building data-driven solutions across analytics, automation, and AI at forward-thinking organisations.</p>
  <div class="exp-grid">
    <div class="exp-item fade-up">
      <div>
        <div class="exp-role">AI Data & Automation Specialist</div>
        <div class="exp-company">The Gemini Lab — AI-Focused Business Consultancy</div>
        <div class="exp-desc">Built AI-powered agents and chatbots using n8n for automated decision-making and conversational workflows. Analysed business data and visualised KPIs through Power BI dashboards for management decision support. Identified and implemented automation opportunities to simplify processes and improve accuracy.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-date">Oct 2025 – Present</div>
    </div>
    <div class="exp-item fade-up">
      <div>
        <div class="exp-role">Data Analyst</div>
        <div class="exp-company">Egyptian Certified Public Accountant (ECPA)</div>
        <div class="exp-desc">Enhanced CRM usability and client experience. Designed and developed custom printing forms using Jaspersoft Studio. Built interactive Power BI dashboards tailored to client decision-making needs. Wrote and optimised SQL queries in SSMS to extract, transform, and manage data for reporting.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-date">Jul – Oct 2025</div>
    </div>
    <div class="exp-item fade-up">
      <div>
        <div class="exp-role">Finance Intern</div>
        <div class="exp-company">Tronics Egypt</div>
        <div class="exp-desc">Assisted in preparing and reviewing financial records. Worked with Excel for data entry, analysis, and reporting. Gained hands-on experience preparing income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements in real business scenarios.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-date">Jun – Aug 2022</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Projects -->
<section id="projects">
  <div class="section-label fade-up">Work</div>
  <h2 class="section-title fade-up">Featured Projects</h2>
  <p class="section-subtitle fade-up">Real solutions deployed to solve real business problems — from pipeline visibility to AI-powered automation.</p>
  <div class="projects-grid">

    <div class="project-card featured fade-up">
      <div class="project-header">
        <div>
          <div class="project-type">Power BI · DAX · Data Modeling</div>
          <div class="project-title">Sales Pipeline Dashboard</div>
          <div class="project-desc">Critical pipeline data was buried in CRM systems, making it impossible to see where leads dropped off. Built a 9-page interactive Power BI dashboard tracking every client's journey — from fresh leads to closed deals. Measures four conversion gaps (Interest, Commitment, Show-Up, Closing), flags when dropped leads exceed 40%, and enables drill-through analysis on individual agents.</div>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="project-tag">Power BI</span><span class="project-tag">DAX</span><span class="project-tag">Data Modeling</span><span class="project-tag">Sales Analytics</span><span class="project-tag">KPI Tracking</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="proj-icon" style="background:rgba(184,245,100,0.1);color:var(--accent)">📊</div>
      </div>
      <div class="project-links">
        <a href="https://app.powerbi.com/view?r=eyJrIjoiNWQ4MzdmN2MtY2U5Ny00NDE1LTljODAtMGM0ZmFmOGQ5ZWY1IiwidCI6ImU3ZTkxMDI3LTk2NTEtNDMxYS04ZWY3LWQyZjI5MWNhODIyMCJ9" target="_blank" class="proj-link live">Live Demo ↗</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/adamalshenawy/sales-pipeline-dashboard" target="_blank" class="proj-link github">GitHub</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card fade-up">
      <div class="project-header">
        <div>
          <div class="project-type">n8n · Telegram API · Automation</div>
          <div class="project-title">Speed to Lead (STL)</div>
          <div class="project-desc">Manual campaign tracking caused delayed lead assignments and high risk of missed opportunities. Built a Telegram bot that instantly detects new leads, notifies managers, routes them to agents in one tap, and timestamps all assignments to prevent duplicates.</div>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="project-tag">Telegram Bot</span><span class="project-tag">n8n</span><span class="project-tag">Lead Distribution</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="proj-icon" style="background:rgba(123,224,168,0.1);color:var(--accent2)">⚡</div>
      </div>
      <div class="project-links">
        <a href="https://github.com/adamalshenawy" target="_blank" class="proj-link github">GitHub</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card fade-up">
      <div class="project-header">
        <div>
          <div class="project-type">AI · n8n · CRM Automation</div>
          <div class="project-title">Call Categorization Catalog</div>
          <div class="project-desc">Sales agents manually updating CRM stages introduced human bias and inconsistency. Built an AI engine that transcribes recorded audio, analyses conversations for buying signals, and automatically classifies and updates CRM stages — delivering zero human bias in data.</div>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="project-tag">AI/LLM</span><span class="project-tag">CRM</span><span class="project-tag">Speech-to-Text</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="proj-icon" style="background:rgba(255,180,50,0.1);color:#f0b832">🎙️</div>
      </div>
      <div class="project-links">
        <a href="https://github.com/adamalshenawy" target="_blank" class="proj-link github">GitHub</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card fade-up">
      <div class="project-header">
        <div>
          <div class="project-type">AI · RAG · Telegram</div>
          <div class="project-title">TM-RAG Agent</div>
          <div class="project-desc">Dashboards show what's happening — this agent explains why. An intelligent Telegram assistant that reads manager queries about performance gaps, cross-references data with internal SDS stage logic, and generates structured root-cause diagnoses with actionable coaching steps.</div>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="project-tag">RAG</span><span class="project-tag">AI Agent</span><span class="project-tag">Coaching</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="proj-icon" style="background:rgba(184,245,100,0.1);color:var(--accent)">🤖</div>
      </div>
      <div class="project-links">
        <a href="https://github.com/adamalshenawy" target="_blank" class="proj-link github">GitHub</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card fade-up">
      <div class="project-header">
        <div>
          <div class="project-type">AI · OCR · Document Automation</div>
          <div class="project-title">AI Contract Assistant Bot</div>
          <div class="project-desc">Creating a single contract required context-switching across multiple systems. Agent uploads a National ID photo to Telegram, AI extracts name/ID/address via OCR, verifies unit availability, merges data into templates, and delivers a finalized PDF — frictionless contract generation.</div>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="project-tag">OCR</span><span class="project-tag">PDF Generation</span><span class="project-tag">n8n</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="proj-icon" style="background:rgba(123,224,168,0.1);color:var(--accent2)">📄</div>
      </div>
      <div class="project-links">
        <a href="https://github.com/adamalshenawy" target="_blank" class="proj-link github">GitHub</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card fade-up">
      <div class="project-header">
        <div>
          <div class="project-type">Power BI · DAX · Banking</div>
          <div class="project-title">Banking KPI Dashboard (Thesis)</div>
          <div class="project-desc">Thesis project awarded Excellent at Galala University. Developed a Power BI dashboard monitoring banking KPIs including loan approval rates, transaction volumes, default risk, and customer segmentation using simulated real-world data.</div>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="project-tag">Power BI</span><span class="project-tag">DAX</span><span class="project-tag">Banking Analytics</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="proj-icon" style="background:rgba(255,180,50,0.1);color:#f0b832">🏦</div>
      </div>
      <div class="project-links">
        <a href="https://github.com/adamalshenawy" target="_blank" class="proj-link github">GitHub</a>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- Skills -->
<section id="skills">
  <div class="section-label fade-up">Expertise</div>
  <h2 class="section-title fade-up">Skills & Tools</h2>
  <p class="section-subtitle fade-up">A full-stack data toolkit — from raw SQL queries to deployed AI agents.</p>
  <div class="skills-wrap fade-up">
    <div class="skill-group">
      <div class="skill-group-title">Data Analysis</div>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="skill-tag">Power BI</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">DAX</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">SQL</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Excel</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Tableau</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Python</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Pandas</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Data Modeling</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">KPI Reporting</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-group">
      <div class="skill-group-title">AI & Automation</div>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="skill-tag">n8n</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Make</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Manychat</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Telegram Bots</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">RAG Pipelines</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">AI Agents</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">APIs</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">OCR</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-group">
      <div class="skill-group-title">Databases & Dev</div>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="skill-tag">SQL Server (SSMS)</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Python</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">HTML</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Git / GitHub</span>
      </div>

<script>
const obs = new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{
  entries.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.classList.add('visible')}})
},{threshold:0.1});
document.querySelectorAll('.fade-up').forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));
</script>
